# @moldy/mega-mpp-sdk

Start with the canonical integration guide before reading anything else:

- Canonical agent guide: https://github.com/ifavo/mega-mpp-sdk/blob/main/docs/agent-integration.md

Default integration path:

- Use `charge` unless the caller explicitly needs a reusable funded channel.
- Use `session` only when the caller wants repeated requests against one funded escrow channel.
- Keep `chainId` and `recipient` explicit. Do not guess network or payee values.
- Use only the public package entrypoints:
  - `@moldy/mega-mpp-sdk/server`
  - `@moldy/mega-mpp-sdk/client`
  - `@moldy/mega-mpp-sdk/chains`
- Use published constants instead of guessing:
  - Mainnet: chainId `4326`, RPC `https://mainnet.megaeth.com/rpc`, charge token USDm `0xFAfDdbb3FC7688494971a79cc65DCa3EF82079E7`
  - Testnet: chainId `6343`, RPC `https://carrot.megaeth.com/rpc`, charge token USDC `0x75139a9559c9cd1ad69b7e239c216151d2c81e6f`
  - Permit2: `0x000000000022D473030F116dDEE9F6B43aC78BA3`
  - Published testnet session escrow: `0xD83A68408539868e5f48D0E93537f56afBB9d512`
- Set `submissionMode` explicitly when the flow broadcasts a transaction.
- Keep the settlement wallet and `recipient` aligned for server-broadcast `charge` and all `session` flows.
- Mainnet `session` requires a user-provided or freshly deployed escrow contract. Do not assume a published mainnet escrow address exists.

Reference docs:

- Charge reference: https://github.com/ifavo/mega-mpp-sdk/blob/main/docs/methods/charge.md
- Session reference: https://github.com/ifavo/mega-mpp-sdk/blob/main/docs/methods/session.md
- Demo and runtime guide: https://github.com/ifavo/mega-mpp-sdk/blob/main/docs/demo.md
